title: taraxacum undulatum
intro: Taraxacum undulatum, also known as the wavy dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion genus. It is a plant used in herbal medicine, particularly for its diuretic properties, which can aid in the treatment of urinary issues and kidney stones. The health benefits of Taraxacum undulatum include its potential to lower blood pressure, act as an anti-inflammatory, and support liver health. Taraxacum undulatum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
